title: Codex 2026 Prompting and Repository Practice · Changed-Case Lab
summary: Apply current Codex guidance across CLI, IDE, app, planning, and repository instructions. The scenario, data, constraints, and failure modes differ from the workshop. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of a Codex-specific prompt and AGENTS.md package with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use goal, context, constraints, and done conditions for material coding work.
Use Plan mode or an interview when requirements are fuzzy or choices are consequential.
Place recurring build, test, lint, review, and boundary guidance in the nearest applicable AGENTS.md.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.prompt:
# Cross-agent prompt portfolio
# Add tested contracts below. Keep shared intent separate from Claude and Codex adaptations.
